allowed_inputs: content-addressed Artifact, Problem, Commitment, and Warrant records reachable from those events
forbidden_inputs: post-trigger outcomes when making a prospective decision

embedder.comparison: exact equality on all three fields

functional_observation.verifier_metric_rule: delta is normalised by the domain evaluator so positive always means improvement

completed_conjecturer_call.no_register: terminal Measure input jolt-independent signal conj-noregister
completed_conjecturer_call.gate_blocks: gate:* Measure events since the preceding conjecturer terminal record and before this terminal record
completed_conjecturer_call.strict_empty_call: a conj-noregister terminal with at least one gate block
exclusions: transport drops with no conjecturer LLMCall

hard_orbit_snapshot.calibration_status: candidate threshold from prior evidence; not production calibrated

soft_exhaustion_snapshot.semantic_novelty: nearest-prior cosine distance within problem family, normalised by the early within-run median
soft_exhaustion_snapshot.recent_window: latest 8 admitted observations strictly after the baseline
soft_exhaustion_snapshot.calibration_status: candidate within-run ratio; not production calibrated

diagnosis_rules.hard_only: hard trigger true and soft trigger false
diagnosis_rules.soft_only: soft trigger true and hard trigger false
diagnosis_rules.ambiguous: both triggers true; excluded from primary efficacy

retrospective_oracle.definition: earliest state after which the next five unjolted calls contain no positive verifier delta
